page: Microsoft Azure F4alds_v7 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine belonging to the Faldsv7 server family. It is powered by dedicated AMD processors and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance features 4 dedicated vCPUs paired with 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per vCPU.

This server configuration includes 472 GB of local storage and is capable of utilizing Premium Storage. It does not bundle any complimentary public IPv4 addresses. There are no graphics processing units included in this hardware profile, making it reliant entirely on the host CPU for all computational tasks.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the F4alds_v7 offers a specialized compute-to-memory ratio designed for workloads that require dedicated CPU resources but do not demand large memory footprints. The inclusion of substantial local storage alongside Premium Storage compatibility makes this instance suitable for tasks such as web serving, batch processing, light database hosting, and development environments where high-speed local disk access is prioritized over memory capacity.
description: Microsoft Azure F4alds_v7 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the Faldsv7 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 4 dedicated vCPUs powered by AMD processors and is configured with 8.0 GB of system memory, establishing a 2.0 GB per vCPU ratio. This low-memory, compute-focused profile is paired with 472 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage for enhanced disk performance. The instance does not include any GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Qualitatively, the F4alds_v7 provides a cost-efficient option for workloads requiring dedicated CPU allocation without the overhead of excess memory. It is well-suited for applications such as web serving, batch processing, and lightweight database operations that benefit from local storage capacity.
